tasks.label: Build and Run TaaviOS
tasks.command: nasm -f bin bootloader.asm -o bootloader.bin; nasm -f bin kernel.asm -o kernel.bin; cmd /c copy /b bootloader.bin+kernel.bin os.bin; python build.py; qemu-system-i386 -drive format=raw,file=os.bin,if=ide,media=disk,index=0 -drive format=raw,file=creds.bin,if=ide,media=disk,index=1

tasks.label: Fresh Build (wipes saved account)
tasks.command: python -c "open('creds.bin','wb').write(bytes(512))"; nasm -f bin bootloader.asm -o bootloader.bin; nasm -f bin kernel.asm -o kernel.bin; cmd /c copy /b bootloader.bin+kernel.bin os.bin; python build.py; qemu-system-i386 -drive format=raw,file=os.bin,if=ide,media=disk,index=0 -drive format=raw,file=creds.bin,if=ide,media=disk,index=1
